name: Ordergroove Subscription & Recurring Revenue API
what_it_does: Ordergroove REST API for subscription commerce and recurring revenue management platform. Enables AI agents to manage subscriber account and subscription plan data retrieval and lifecycle management, handle subscription creation, modification, and cancellation automation, access subscription order schedule and billing cycle management, retrieve subscriber health scoring and churn risk data for retention, manage subscription offers and incentive configuration for subscriber acquisition, handle failed payment recovery and dunning workflow automation, access subscriber analytics and cohort retention data, retrieve product add-on and upsell data for subscriber engagement, manage subscription pausing, skipping, and reactivation workflows, and integrate subscription data with Shopify, BigCommerce, Salesforce Commerce Cloud, and loyalty platforms.
use_cases: Managing subscriber retention from customer success automation agents
Processing subscription modifications from self-service portal agents
Recovering failed subscription payments from dunning automation agents
Analyzing subscriber churn risk from revenue analytics agents
not_for: B2B software subscriptions without consumer e-commerce and physical product focus
Simple recurring billing without subscriber lifecycle and retention management
Non-e-commerce subscriptions without Shopify or BigCommerce integration context
best_when: A retail brand using Ordergroove wants AI agents to automate subscriber management, retention campaigns, failed payment recovery, subscription analytics, and e-commerce platform integration.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Subscription modification automation (price changes, product swaps) directly impacts subscriber billing — require approval workflow for bulk subscription changes. Dunning automation without subscriber communication triggers increases cancellation rates. Subscriber PII requires GDPR/CCPA-compliant data handling in automated workflows.

auth.notes: Ordergroove uses API key authentication. Per-merchant API credentials. Documentation at docs.ordergroove.com. Webhooks for subscription lifecycle events. REST API with JSON responses. Shopify and BigCommerce native integrations. Salesforce Commerce Cloud connector available. Subscribe-and-save program management. US-based company.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — percentage of subscription revenue with monthly minimum
pricing.paid_tiers: Percentage of subscription revenue; volume pricing for established subscription programs
pricing.notes: New York City, New York. Founded 2010. Private ($100M+ funding). Subscription e-commerce market. 300+ brand customers including PetSmart, Solo Stove, and Reebok. Known for 'Subscribe and Save' program management. Strong in CPG and health & wellness categories. Competes with Recharge and Skio for Shopify subscription commerce.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented in API reference

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Bulk subscription modifications impact subscriber billing; require approval workflow before applying changes to subscriber cohorts
Subscriber communication required — dunning and recovery automation should include subscriber notification; silent recovery attempts increase cancellation rates
Webhook for lifecycle events — use webhooks for subscription creation, modification, and failed payment events rather than polling
Platform integration dependencies — most Ordergroove customers use Shopify or BigCommerce integration; direct API use is less common than platform connector
Revenue percentage pricing — Ordergroove charges percentage of subscription revenue; high-volume automation affecting subscription revenue impacts licensing costs
Churn risk scoring — Ordergroove provides subscriber health scores; integrate into retention automation before subscriber reaches cancellation request
agent_readiness.security_notes: Subscription commerce. PCI-DSS L1, GDPR, CCPA. API key. US. Subscriber and recurring payment data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Subscription e-commerce. PCI-DSS L1, GDPR, CCPA. API key. US. Subscriber and payment data.
